name: Twenty Fore Golf
about: Twenty Fore Golf is an indoor golf facility in Southern Pines, NC, offering a premier golfing experience with cutting-edge TrackMan technology. The venue provides a modern lounge environment with leather seating and TVs, ideal for both serious practice and casual play. Membership options start at $125/month for unlimited access, with public rates of $50/hour. It caters to golfers of all levels, from beginners looking to learn to seasoned players aiming to refine their skills, and is available for events and private parties.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball tracking
Unlimited practice access with a convenient 7-day-a-week schedule
Discounted lessons with PGA Professionals using advanced motion analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, BYOB policy likely applies
No on-site bar mentioned, BYOB policy likely applies

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor technology providing ball flight and club swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs as there is no mention of club rentals being included in the membership or hourly rates.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy as there is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on the simulators takes approximately 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children 9 and under can play for free in the same bay as a member, and specific memberships accommodate junior players under 18 with parental consent.
